description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 11 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 39 mins per day. His activity was mainly in Java and Markdown, with smaller amounts in other languages. The data shows work spread across 4 projects, but no public repositories, commits, or PRs are listed.
